raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need bash command to delete empty directories recursively. Use find. Command: find /system/folder3/temp -type d -empty -delete. But to remove empty directories including those that become empty after removal, need to run find with -depth. So: find /system/folder3/temp -depth -type d -empty -delete. Output single line.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need bash command to delete empty directories recursively. Use find. Command: find /system/folder3/temp -type d -empty -delete. But to remove empty directories including those that become empty after removal, need to run find with -depth. So: find /system/folder3/temp -depth -type d -empty -delete. Output single line.
